Bushkill Trail from Rt. 512 to Jacobsburg Park.  Public walking / running / cycling 2 mile cinder path.  Lots of Wild edibles, bordered by private lands.  Snakes, turtles, frogs in Sober Run (creek) nearby.  Deer, squirrel, raccoon, possum, ducks, geese, doves
Apple tree at the edge of the flea market parking lot, to the far left as you’re driving into the overflow parking area. In season, there are often apples all over the ground nearby. Access: Public.
